name: useKeyboard
description: Hook that helps to listen for keyboard events
examples: useKeyboard(ref, { onKeyDown: (event) => console.log('key down'), onKeyUp: (event) => console.log('key up') });
const ref = useKeyboard({ onKeyDown: (event) => console.log('key down'), onKeyUp: (event) => console.log('key up') });

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target to attach the event listeners to

source.source: * @param {HookTarget} target The target to attach the event listeners to

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback function to be invoked on key down
